items.statcast_observation: Jac Caglianone produced the hardest tracked Royals contact: 115.0 mph at a 16.0 degree launch angle.
items.summary: The Royals beat the New York Mets, KC 16, NYM 12. Tyler Tolbert led the night, 5-6 | HR, 2 RBI, 4 R in the latest Royals game. Jac Caglianone supplied the loudest Royals contact at 115.0 mph.
items.title: Royals at Mets Recap
